zh.lifeSummary: 當Mac Bethad Mac Findláich King Of Scotland於1005年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，他的父親Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus30歲，母親Donada Canmore of Dunkeld16歲。他於1021年與Queen Mac Bethad of Scotland在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1057年8月15日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾盧福哈南享年52歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mac Bethad Mac Findláich King Of Scotland于1005年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，他的父亲Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus30岁，母亲Donada Canmore of Dunkeld16岁。他于1021年与Queen Mac Bethad of Scotland在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1057年8月15日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾盧福哈南享年52岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Mark  , now also quite popular in the English-speaking world. It was given some currency in England in the 1960s by the pop singer  Marc Bolan  (  1947–77 ).

variants.name: Mark
meanings: From the Latin name Marcus , borne by the Evangelist, author of the second gospel in the New Testament, and by several other early and medieval saints. In Arthurian legend, King Mark is the aged ruler of Cornwall to whom Isolde is brought as a bride by Tristan; his name was presumably of Celtic origin, perhaps derived from the element march ‘horse’. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages but was in more frequent use by the end of the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Bethad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Welsh pet form of   Beth  , now also popular elsewhere in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mac Bethad Mac Findláich King Of Scotland was born in 1005, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus, was 30 and his mother, Donada Canmore of Dunkeld, was 16. He married Queen Mac Bethad of Scotland in 1021, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 15 August 1057, in Lumphanan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mac Bethad Mac Findláich King Of Scotland est né en 1005, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Donada Canmore of Dunkeld, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Queen Mac Bethad of Scotland en 1021, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 15 août 1057, à Lumphanan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1021 in Scotland Queen Mac Bethad of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 15. August 1057 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Lumphanan, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Mac Bethad Mac Findláich King Of Scotlandが1005年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，父Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angusは30歳，母Donada Canmore of Dunkeldは16歳であった。1021年にスコットランドでQueen Mac Bethad of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1057年8月15日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアルンファナンで52歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ アイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: Mac Bethad Mac Findláich King Of Scotland(이)가 1005년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Donada Canmore of Dunkeld(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1021년 스컷랜드에서 Queen Mac Bethad of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1057년 8월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 럼프아난에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig: исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mac Bethad Mac Findláich King Of Scotland родился в 1005 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Donada Canmore of Dunkeld, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Queen Mac Bethad of Scotland в 1021 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 15 августа 1057 г. в местности лумфанан, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.
